---
title: "Лекции"
---

```{=html}
<div class="resource-list">
  <a class="resource-card resource-card-lectures" href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/statistical-analysis-course/ru/slides">
    <span class="resource-title">Курс по статистическому анализу</span>
    <span class="resource-note">Слайды курса</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
